title: Stock can go negative on Adjust
body: Adjust applies delta without a floor check, so a large negative delta drives Quantity below zero.

title: Stock adjustments are not audited
body: audit.Log is a no-op and AdjustStock never calls it. Persist an AuditEntry for each adjustment.

title: GetItem error not mapped to gRPC NotFound code
body: The handler returns the raw error; it should map ErrNotFound to a proper gRPC NotFound status.

title: No batch adjust endpoint
body: Clients adjust one SKU at a time. Add a batch AdjustStock to reduce round trips.

title: ItemRepo has no delete operation
body: Discontinued SKUs cannot be removed. Add Delete(sku) to ItemRepo.

title: main wires handler but never serves
body: cmd/server/main.go builds the handler then discards it. Start an actual gRPC listener.

title: Concurrent Adjust can lose updates
body: Adjust does read-modify-write across separate repo calls without a lock, risking lost updates.
